title: Token Introspection
description: Implement POST /api/v1/auth/token/introspect per RFC 7662. Accept token in body, return active status plus decoded claims. Cache introspection results in Redis (TTL = remaining token lifetime). Support both JWT and opaque token formats.
validation: Returns active status and decoded claims
Caches results in Redis with TTL = remaining token lifetime
Tests verify introspection for valid tokens
Tests verify introspection for expired/invalid tokens
